item.title: Bill Walters (Arkansas politician)
item.description: Bill Walters (April 17, 1943 – March 5, 2013) was an American lawyer, businessman, and politician.

item.title: OXEN Peristeronas
item.description: OXEN Peristeronas is a Cypriot football club based in Peristerona. Founded in 1950, it sometimes played in the Third and Fourth Divisions.

item.title: British Junior Open Squash 2012
item.description: The British Junior Open 2012 is the edition of the 2012's British Junior Open Squash, which is a World Junior Squash Circuit event Tier 2. The event took place in Sheffield in England from 2 to 6 January.

item.title: Powerex (semiconductors)
item.description: Powerex Inc., is a Pennsylvania-based company specializing in high power semiconductor applications. Powerex supports many markets, including transportation, AC and DC motor controls, UPS, alternative energy, medical power supplies, welding, industrial heating, electrical vehicles, aircraft, and communications.[1]

item.title: France at the 1973 World Aquatics Championships
item.description: France competed at the 1973 World Aquatics Championships in Belgrade, Yugoslavia from August 31 to September 9.
